questions.text: Which Google Cloud product or feature is BEST to organize projects and folders?
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.text: Which Google Cloud service should you use to organize projects and folders?
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.text: What is the recommended Google Cloud solution to organize projects and folders?
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.text: A platform team must organize projects and folders. Which option aligns with Google best practices?
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.text: For cost-aware operations, you should organize projects and folders.
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.text: A cloud engineer needs to organize projects and folders.
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.text: Your startup is building on Google Cloud and needs to organize projects and folders.
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.text: A data team must organize projects and folders.
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.

questions.text: A platform team must organize projects and folders (variant 3). Which option aligns with Google best practices?
questions.explanation: Hierarchy enables policy inheritance.
